stories.title: Write stories contract
stories.description: Author .prism/shared/contracts/stories-contract.md: canonical stories.json schema + plan->stories mapping rules.
steps: Author .prism/shared/contracts/stories-contract.md: canonical stories.json schema + plan->stories mapping rules.

stories.title: prism-plan emits stories
stories.description: Add Step 6 to prism-plan: emit stories.json via decompose_plan; add epic back-link.
steps: Add Step 6 to prism-plan: emit stories.json via decompose_plan; add epic back-link.

stories.title: plan-template epic field
stories.description: Add epic front-matter field + stories-emit note to the plan template.
steps: Add epic front-matter field + stories-emit note to the plan template.

stories.title: create_plan emits stories
stories.description: Mirror the emit-stories step in the create_plan command.
steps: Mirror the emit-stories step in the create_plan command.

stories.title: decompose_plan canonical engine
stories.description: Document decompose_plan as the canonical plan->stories engine; cite the contract.
steps: Document decompose_plan as the canonical plan->stories engine; cite the contract.

stories.title: prism-implement reads stories
stories.description: prism-implement loads stories.json into TodoWrite; plan.md is narrative only.
steps: prism-implement loads stories.json into TodoWrite; plan.md is narrative only.

stories.title: prism-subagent seeds from stories
stories.description: prism-subagent seeds state.json from stories (one story=one task, by id).
steps: prism-subagent seeds state.json from stories (one story=one task, by id).

stories.title: state-schema keyed by story id
stories.description: state-schema: add stories_path; tasks keyed by story id; state=runtime status.
steps: state-schema: add stories_path; tasks keyed by story id; state=runtime status.

stories.title: iterate re-emits stories
stories.description: prism-iterate + iterate_plan re-emit stories on plan edit with stable ids.
steps: prism-iterate + iterate_plan re-emit stories on plan edit with stable ids.

stories.title: validate story coverage gate
stories.description: prism-validate + validate_plan add a plan<->stories coverage gate.
steps: prism-validate + validate_plan add a plan<->stories coverage gate.

stories.title: locator co-surfaces stories
stories.description: prism-locator co-surfaces a plan's emitted stories.
steps: prism-locator co-surfaces a plan's emitted stories.

stories.title: review-finding fixes
stories.description: Address two-stage review: subagent fallback wording, verify negative-assertion, contract id example.
steps: Address two-stage review: subagent fallback wording, verify negative-assertion, contract id example.

stories.title: bundle+seed contract distribution
stories.description: Bundle stories-contract.md + seed via init_prism.py into new/migrated/re-run projects.
steps: Bundle stories-contract.md + seed via init_prism.py into new/migrated/re-run projects.
